response.justification: Maria is a highly skilled Staff/Senior Software Engineer with nearly two decades of experience, which drastically exceeds the requirements for this entry-level/junior position. While she perfectly matches the technical stack (TypeScript, React, Node.js) and possesses the desired nice-to-have AI/LLM qualifications, she is severely overqualified. This massive misalignment in seniority likely means her compensation expectations and career goals will not match the limited scope and budget of a junior role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack expertise using TypeScript, React, and Node.js.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, clean architecture, and TDD.
Possesses highly relevant nice-to-have skills, including LLM integrations, AWS, and Kubernetes.
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level position, having held Staff, Senior, and Founder titles.
Compensation expectations will almost certainly exceed the budget for a junior/mid-level role.
High risk of job dissatisfaction or rapid turnover due to the limited scope and responsibilities of an entry-level position.
